name: Strategic Attack
descriptionTemplate: After commanding a unit to attack, if the target is not annihilated, there is X% chance that a tracking mark will be added to that target. Targets with tracking marks receive 20% more damage, lasts for 1 turns.

progression.renderedDesc: After commanding a unit to attack, if the target is not annihilated, there is 20% chance that a tracking mark will be added to that target. Targets with tracking marks receive 20% more damage, lasts for 1 turns.

After commanding a unit to attack, if the target is not annihilated, there is 40% chance that a tracking mark will be added to that target. Targets with tracking marks receive 20% more damage, lasts for 1 turns.

After commanding a unit to attack, if the target is not annihilated, there is 60% chance that a tracking mark will be added to that target. Targets with tracking marks receive 20% more damage, lasts for 1 turns.

After commanding a unit to attack, if the target is not annihilated, there is 80% chance that a tracking mark will be added to that target. Targets with tracking marks receive 20% more damage, lasts for 1 turns.

After commanding a unit to attack, if the target is not annihilated, there is 100% chance that a tracking mark will be added to that target. Targets with tracking marks receive 20% more damage, lasts for 1 turns.
